onboarding.try_ai: рҹ‘Ү Try one of these to get started:
onboarding.ai_hint:
рҹ’Ў *Quick tip:* Just type any message and I'll respond with AI!

You can also use:
вҖў `/ask <question>` вҖ” Quick Q&A
вҖў `/code <code>` вҖ” Code review
вҖў `/translate <text>` вҖ” Smart translation
onboarding.image_hint:
рҹ’Ў *Quick tip:* Use `/image <description>` to generate images!

Try: `/image a cat in space digital-art`

Styles: realistic, anime, digital-art, oil-painting, pixel-art, watercolor, cyberpunk, fantasy, 3d, sketch
